query: What is the most recent World Bank / Argus Media monthly price of liquid sulphur Tampa in USD per metric ton for 2026? What were the values month by month January through June 2026?
answer:
## Summary

I researched the World Bank / Argus Media monthly liquid sulphur Tampa price for 2026 and found a **critical data-availability issue**:

**There is no month-by-month World Bank liquid sulphur Tampa price for January–June 2026.** I directly inspected four consecutive Pink Sheet editions (December 2025, April, May, and June 2026 — the June 2 edition being the most recent). **None of them contain a sulphur series.** The World Bank appears to have discontinued its "Sulphur (Tampa)" line item; the current Fertilizers group lists only DAP, Phosphate rock, Potassium chloride, TSP, and Urea (E. Europe).

**What the actual market data (Argus) shows** — the real Tampa benchmark is a **quarterly** contract in $/long tonne delivered, not a monthly World Bank print:
- **Q4 2025:** $116/lt delivered (up from $76/lt in Q3 2025)
- **Q1 2026:** projected/reported at **$475–520/lt delivered** (up from a ~$310/lt baseline)
- **Q2 2026:** settled at a **record high in April 2026**, amid Iran-war-driven supply tightness (exact figure paywalled)

**Trajectory:** sharply upward through H1 2026 — spot sulfur hit an all-time high in June 2026 (~+286% YoY).

**Caveat for the caller:** The Metaculus question (#43612) referencing "the World Bank monthly price of liquid sulphur in June 2026" points to a series the World Bank no longer publishes — so resolution may depend on an archived/alternate World Bank data file or a different source. I could not retrieve exact monthly USD/mt values because the requested World Bank series does not exist for 2026, and the nearest real benchmark (Argus Tampa contract) is quarterly and partly behind subscription paywalls.
